contradictions.claim_text: Learners need OET Grade B to register with DHA.
contradictions.conflict_summary: The official DHA residency page requires OET=300 (C+ in all categories), not grade B.
contradictions.resolution: Block the universal B-grade wording for DHA and use the exact DHA threshold.

contradictions.claim_text: Learners need OET Grade B to register with DoH Abu Dhabi.
contradictions.conflict_summary: The official DoH Abu Dhabi residency page requires OET >= C for international graduates, not grade B.
contradictions.resolution: Block the universal B-grade wording for DoH Abu Dhabi and use the exact DoH threshold.

contradictions.claim_text: Learners need OET Grade B to register with DHA or DoH or migrate to the UK or Australia.
contradictions.conflict_summary: The compound claim mixes two contradicted UAE subclaims with two verified UK/Australia subclaims and adds unsupported migration wording.
contradictions.resolution: Split into jurisdiction-specific facts; do not publish the compound statement.
